attributes.action: Free parliamentary vote on defensive action against Iran
attributes.additional_details: I believe there is broad public sentiment against allowing the USA to use our military assets, and as this clearly increases the chances of an attack on U.K. assets by Iran, this must be sacrioned by a free vote in Parliament. The British people must have a say in this.
attributes.background: I want Parliament to have a free vote (no whips) on allowing the USA to use U.K. military assets in their defensive action against Iran.

rejection.details: You may wish to sign this petition, which calls for similar action: "Hold an immediate parliamentary vote on US use of UK bases" https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/762994
